title: Setup npm monorepo structure with workspaces, shared tsconfig, and build tooling
description: Create root package.json with workspaces for packages/hls-ipfs-loader, packages/example-player, and tests/e2e. Add shared tsconfig.json. Setup npm workspaces.

title: Build hls-ipfs-loader package - HLS.js custom loader using Helia
description: Create packages/hls-ipfs-loader with a custom HLS.js loader that intercepts requests for IPFS content and fetches via Helia UnixFS. Must implement HLS.js Loader interface. TypeScript with proper types.

title: Build example-player Vite app demonstrating the IPFS HLS loader
description: Create packages/example-player with Vite, creates a Helia node in-browser, initializes HLS.js with the custom loader, plays /ipfs/QmbdmJ2JRvEFhWWzHKrAcjjBdkcs46F2N7ggZnrdKKAu4s/manifest.m3u8. Include basic UI with video element.

title: Setup Playwright e2e tests for video playback verification
description: Create tests/e2e with Playwright tests that verify the example player loads and video plays. Test that HLS segments load via IPFS. Configure playwright.config.ts to start the dev server.

title: Fix typecheck: root tsc --build picks up test files with .ts imports
description: Root tsconfig.json has no include/references, so tsc --build compiles all .ts files including test files. Fix by either adding project references to root tsconfig or restructuring typecheck to work per-workspace.

title: Clean stale tsc build artifacts and update .gitignore
description: Remove stale .js/.d.ts/.map files from tsc --build outside dist/ dirs (vite.config, playwright.config, video-playback.spec). Update .gitignore to prevent recurrence. Ensure all backpressure checks still pass.

title: Create Svelte example app with IPFS HLS player
description: Svelte 5 app with input field, history, quality selector

title: Add public STUN servers to example-player and example-svelte
